calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Continued To Jun-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Jay Greene, Esq. for Linda Jenkins, Administrator;
Noe-Marie Claraty, Esq. for Kenneth Jenkins, Jr.

The Court stated that the matter was on calendar for status on the filing of a petition for final distribution. Mr. Greene stated that they are filing the petition for final distribution, briefly addressed the discrepancy in the bond amount, stated that they collected all the assets, and noted that there are only two heirs in the estate. Mr. Greene also stated that a formal accounting was requested and that he has all the statements.

The Court continued today's status hearing to June 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 and ordered an accounting for the period of December 16, 2021, through December 31, 2023. The accounting is to be filed two weeks before the next status hearing on June 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 unless the accounting is waived.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Guitron. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Continued To May-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jay Greene for administrator Linda Lenkins (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Greene reported that remaining assets were being recovered from the State Controller's Office as unclaimed property and requested a 90-day continuance.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to May 4, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court noted that notice should be provided to the other heir regarding the right to petition for an accounting.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Continued To Feb-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jay Greene, Esq., for Linda Jenkins, Personal Representative.
No other appearances.

At the court's query, counsel offers the court a status of the estate. The court and counsel discuss and confirm a new hearing date, and the matter is continued to Feb-02-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel assures the court that he intends to file either a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition for additional time to administer the estate, prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
